title: Death Animations
description: [players & entities] explode into bits when they die!
body:
![project description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1813838e7ccca73eca8e0cc23dfabc84a6f8e09_0.webp)

## Death Animations
- Supported Versions: **1.20.2+**
- Players explode into ~Red colored blocks when they meet their demise!
- Mobs have varying Gibs!

**Zombie, Skeleton, Wither Skeleton, Creeper, Drowned, Ender Dragon, Enderman, Ghast, Spider, Evoker, Vindicator, Piglin, Piglin Brutes and Warden** are currently supported. More to come in the Future!

## Extras
Mob Gibbing is enabled by default, but you can disable it by running the command:
```
/scoreboard players set EnableMobGibbing gib.CONFIG 0
```
## Credits
#### SCHMOOVE II (chopstickwater)

[SCHMOOVE II](https://discord.gg/B25MX3D5fG) is a Movement Shooter created by **chopstickwater** on the Sandbox Server [legitimoose.com](https://store.legitimoose.com/). Gibbing (or 'Death Animations') was an original feature introduced to the game by her, where players would explode into small colored blocks (or 'Gibs') when they died. These were physics-based, meaning the explosions were as authentic as they can be.

Suspicious Link?
https://files.catbox.moe/8to4ap.mp4
